description: Create CLI command structure with Cobra: Set up cobra commands in cmd/ directory. Commands: 'wt' (default: launch TUI), 'wt config add <name> <path>' (add project), 'wt config list' (list projects), 'wt config init' (create default config). Root command should load config and launch TUI if no subcommand. Add persistent flags for --config to specify custom config path.
acceptance_criteria: cmd/root.go exists with root command setup
cmd/config.go exists with add, list, init subcommands
Running 'wt' with no args launches TUI

verification.value: cd wt && go build && ./wt config list
